name: mcp-builder
tagline: Official Anthropic skill for scaffolding MCP servers — protocol setup, tools, resources, and testing.
verdict: Well-built: no attempt to steer or game an evaluator, instructions stay on-task. Only real gaps are hygiene — the mcp package dependency is pinned to a minimum version rather than exact, and there's no version field or changelog to track changes.

highlights.summary: No versioning signal (version field or changelog) in frontmatter or body.
The `mcp` package is pinned to a minimum version (>=1.1.0) rather than an exact version — minor supply-chain looseness.
No attempt to steer the evaluator; instructions serve the skill's task only.
